directions.name: Operational Theatre
directions.metaphor: A dispatch floor where one live system is demonstrated clearly, then unpacked chapter by chapter.
directions.material: Deep cobalt field, warm-white structural frame, crisp rules, restrained translucent surfaces.
directions.composition: One dominant hero stage followed by open ledgers, split narratives, and vertical operating sequences.
directions.typography: Large direct sans-serif headlines with compact operational labels and readable editorial body copy.
directions.motion: Poster-first video reveal, short in-view chapter entrances, and small directional feedback on controls.
directions.conversion: A visible primary route to book a demo, with contextual proof and secondary contact options.
directions.risk: Can feel too technical if the copy loses its human and revenue-focused language.

directions.name: Signal Atlas
directions.metaphor: A network map tracing every customer signal from first contact to booked work.
directions.material: Blueprint blue, plotted lines, coordinate ticks, small luminous nodes, and data-dense panels.
directions.composition: Diagram-led sections with lateral routes, branching pathways, and compact modular readouts.
directions.typography: Condensed display type paired with technical monospace annotations.
directions.motion: Lines draw between nodes and labels activate as the visitor scrolls through the route.
directions.conversion: Interactive route ends at a diagnostic audit invitation.
directions.risk: It doubles down on the geometric decoration the current design already overuses.

directions.name: Human Dispatch
directions.metaphor: A documentary story about the people behind urgent calls and the relief of a reliable response.
directions.material: Ink blue, paper-white editorial fields, candid service photography, and soft grain.
directions.composition: Magazine-like image and quote sequences with generous whitespace and fewer interface elements.
directions.typography: Expressive editorial serif headlines with quiet sans-serif supporting text.
directions.motion: Slow image dissolves, restrained text reveals, and nearly static controls.
directions.conversion: Trust-building stories lead into a personal consultation invitation.
directions.risk: It requires a strong library of authentic client photography and underuses the supplied dispatch video.

selection_reason: It preserves the supplied dispatch video and recognizable blue frame while directly fixing the overlap, decorative-control, and repeated-card problems found in the audit.
